Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The prompt describes a table event_log with columns case_id activity timestamp Task filter out cases with more than six events return only events from cases with six or fewer events Query should identify count per case_id exclude those with count greater than 6 return all rows for the remaining cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Likely using window functions or subquery with group by and then filtering with WHERE case_id IN SELECT case_id FROM event_log GROUP BY case_id HAVING COUNT less than or equal to 6

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Also could use a window function COUNT OVER PARTITION BY case_id then filter where that count less than or equal to 6 Both are valid
